---
title: "Stack"
description: >-
  Tools and methods: languages, R and Python libraries, sequencing software,
  databases, infrastructure, authoring and illustration.
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
The tools I work with, and the methods I use them for.
:::

## Tools

::: {.stack-grid}

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i></span>

#### Languages
- R
- Python
- SQL
- Bash
- JavaScript
- PHP
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i></span>

#### R packages
- tidyverse
- ggplot2
- Bioconductor
- Shiny
- DBI, dbplyr, pool
- roxygen2, testthat, pkgdown
- Rcpp
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i></span>

#### Python libraries
- NumPy
- pandas
- scikit-learn
- Keras
- TensorFlow
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i></span>

#### Sequencing software
- Dorado
- Guppy (legacy)
- minimap2
- samtools
- POD5 and fast5 formats
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-database"></i></span>

#### Databases
- MySQL and MariaDB
- SQLite
- PostgreSQL
- phpMyAdmin
- HDF5
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i></span>

#### Infrastructure
- Git and GitHub
- GitHub Actions
- Docker
- Linux, WSL
- SLURM
- Shiny Server, Apache
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i></span>

#### Authoring
- Quarto
- R Markdown
- knitr
- renv
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-brush"></i></span>

#### Illustration
- Inkscape
- Krita
- PaintTool SAI
- Adobe Illustrator
:::

:::

## Methods

::: {.stack-grid}

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-soundwave"></i></span>

#### Sequencing and signal
- Nanopore direct RNA sequencing
- cDNA sequencing
- Signal-level analysis
- Poly(A) tail length estimation
- Tail composition classification
- Long-read alignment and BAM tag handling
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></span>

#### Machine learning
- Deep learning on signal-derived images
- Computer vision
- Model training and evaluation
- Benchmarking against orthogonal methods
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-check2-square"></i></span>

#### Data and practice
- Relational schema design
- Access control and audit logging
- R package development and testing
- Code review and semantic versioning
- Data management plans
:::

:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-cta" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> See it applied</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
:::
